characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Considered to be the main character along with Max Evans. Liz is your typical girl next door. She's a beautiful human girl. The show centers around her life being saved unexpectedly by the mysterious Max Evans. She feels an instant and undeniable connection to him and realizes that he has felt the same about her from afar for years. Much of the show is dealing with the consequences of falling in love with an alien. Amicable Exes: Eventually achieves this with Kyle. Anchored Ship: Good God, Max and Liz went through almost every variety of this trope Beware the Nice Ones: Don't try to hurt Max or any of her friends and she will retaliate. Tess found this out the hard way. Brainy Brunette: Wants to be a molecular biologist.

characters.name: Liz Parker
characters.description: Considered to be the main character along with Max Evans. Liz is your typical girl next door. She's a beautiful human girl. The show centers around her life being saved unexpectedly by the mysterious Max Evans. She feels an instant and undeniable connection to him and realizes that he has felt the same about her from afar for years. Much of the show is dealing with the consequences of falling in love with an alien. Amicable Exes: Eventually achieves this with Kyle. Anchored Ship: Good God, Max and Liz went through almost every variety of this trope Beware the Nice Ones: Don't try to hurt Max or any of her friends and she will retaliate. Tess found this out the hard way. Brainy Brunette: Wants to be a molecular biologist.

characters.name: Max Evans
characters.description: Arguably the main character along with Liz. Max Evans is the human alien hybrid that jump started the whole show. Max seems like a somewhat unassuming, mysterious guy to Liz Parker before he uses his alien powers to save her life. Max is known as the responsible one. He is seen to be kind, caring, heroic and often selfless. He's the leader of his people reincarnated and it shows in his actions. He has loved Liz Parker from afar his whole life and he couldn't bear to see her die so he saved her life. Action Hero: Not really by choice but his actions are the catalyst for most of the action in the series Actual Pacifist: Max doesn't like to kill people. It actually becomes a plot point later in the series when he has to make difficult decisions for his family on earth and on his own planet. The Atoner: Had a major case of this in "A Roswell Christmas Carol." Bad Actor, Good Liar: : Max is an alien/human hybrid who is able to pass as a regular, if somewhat shy human. In "Secrets and Lies", he auditions for a small role onStar Trek: Enterpriseand is told byJonathan FrakesandJohn Billingsleythat he isn't convincing as an alien.

characters.name: Michael Guerin
characters.description: Abusive Parents: Michael's adoptive "father" is analcoholicwho is verbally abusive and also beats him. Parental Abandonment: Michael's recklessness in uncovering his roots is informed by his lack of parents and familial love.

characters.name: Isabel Evans
characters.description: Isabel Evans is an alien-human hybrid like her brother Max Evans and best friend Michael Guerin. She and Max were found as six-year-old children wandering in the desert by Philip and Diane Evans, who adopted them. Isabel is a very visible, popular girl at school. She hides her kind side beneath a front of haughtiness and cold unfeeling—she is the perfect, unknowable, unobtainable beauty. On the outside, she is the most outgoing of the three hybrids and blends in with the human society with ease. On the inside Isabel is probably the most vulnerable of the three. She so wants to be accepted for her alien side as much as her human side. Alpha Bitch:Subverted TropeIsabel puts on this front to protect herself and her secret, terrified of letting anyone in. She eventually lets Alex in and they fall in love. Dream Walker: Isabel's special alien ability is the ability to enter someone's dream. It's unclear if she can manipulate dreams as well. Human Alien: Although how much human and how much alien is unknown, untilWord of Godon the subject is available, and if she even has an alien form. I Just Want to Be Normal: Isabel doesn't relent on this until the last episode of the series, where the Pod Squad goes on the run from the FBI

characters.name: Alex Whitman
characters.description: Butt-Monkey:Subverted TropeAlex is left out of the loop by Maria and Liz early on and even commits a crime giving his blood to pass of as Max's without a thank you ("Blood Brother"), but Alex stands up for himself and ends his friendship with Liz briefly when she refuses to tell him the truth. Eventually Alex is let in ("Heat Wave") and becomes a part of the Pod Squad. Killed Off for Real:Tess kills him when she mindwarps him one final time after severely damaging his mind. Moment Killer: Alex has this with Isabel because of Tess, who interrupts Alex trying to ask out Isabel. ("Crazy")

characters.name: Sheriff Jim Valenti
characters.description: Heel–Face Turn: Starts supporting the group after Max saves his son.

characters.name: Tess Harding
characters.description: Dude Magnet: Says herself that guys are always after her and Kyle remarks on how she's hot, along with some other guys at Prom later on Everyone Loves Blondes: Kyle refers to her as a "knockout" Hands-Off Parenting: Essentially grew up without any parental restrictions – or family of any kind. Killed Off for Real:In the penultimate episode of the series, she sacrifices herself by blowing up the base with her inside. Master of Illusion: Tess's main power is to make people see what she wants them to see, hear, feel, etc. She uses this power on Alex so much that he dies as a result.

characters.name: Allies
characters.description: Sudden Sequel Death Syndrome:Killed in the first episode of Season 2. Killed Off for Real:He gets fatally injured by the Skins in Season 2, and dies in Max’s arms. The Mole:Revealed to have been working for the Kivar. Heroic Suicide:Kills herself rather than be forced to reveal Max and the others’ identities. Irrational Hatred: He despises Max before they even meet, and actually tries to kill him during their first meeting, only stopping because he is literally programmed not to.

characters.name: Government Antagonists
characters.description: Accidental Murder:Michael accidentally kills him when he uses his powers to stop Pierce from killing Valenti. Ax-Crazy: It boggles the mind that someone as blatantly psychotic, sadistic, and murder happy as Pierce made it into the FBI. Killer Cop: There is no way in hell this man should have been made a federal agent. Killed Off for Real:Michael inadvertently kills him when he uses his powers to stop Pierce from killing Valenti, and Valenti, Max, and Michael burn the body and bury it in the desert. Knight Templar: He is a deranged fanatic doggedly determined to protect Earth from aliens, and his go-to solution to people getting in his way is to either torture them or kill them.

characters.name: Alien Antagonists
characters.description: Killed Off for Real:Tess turns him into ash inadvertently while trying to mindwarp him for torturing Max. Arc Villain: For the first three episodes of Season 2. We Hardly Knew Ye:Only around for three episodes before being killed off.
